page_content:
Prerequisite: MUSC102; or permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

MUSC106 Beginning Classical Guitar (2 Credits) Introduction to classical guitar notation, technique, literature and performance. No previous musical experience required.

MUSC123 Movement for Singers (1 Credit)

Systematic exercises, improvisations and dances in conjunction with artistic vocal expression. Performance and critique of stage deportment, gestures and recital techniques.
